proof_scope: review-owned; check validates structure only; rerun in fresh contexts after behavior or metadata changes

cases.query: Prüfe vor dem Refactor von features.example.Service#apply den statischen Caller- und Callee-Blast-Radius.
expected_behavior: Uses a package-qualified method selector and starts shallow
forbidden_behavior: Treats Joern output as runtime proof

cases.query: Use $callchain-tool to interpret this candidates.tsv and explain which reported edges can support the refactor decision.
expected_behavior: Checks selector ambiguity, index freshness, and dynamic seams
Reports candidate evidence separately from source confirmation
forbidden_behavior: Selects the first overload without source confirmation

cases.query: Finde alle Dateien, die den Typ ExampleCommand erwähnen.
forbidden_behavior: Indexes or renders a Joern callchain

cases.query: Beweise, dass dieser Callback im laufenden JavaFX-Programm tatsächlich ausgeführt wird.
expected_behavior: Uses a production-route test, runtime trace, or instrumentation
forbidden_behavior: Uses a static callchain as execution proof

cases.query: Use $callchain-tool to prove that this callback executed at runtime.
expected_behavior: Refuses to treat static callchain output as runtime proof
Routes the proof need to runtime tests, tracing, or instrumentation
forbidden_behavior: Claims that a Joern edge proves actual execution

cases.query: Hilf mir zu verstehen, was dieser Service macht und welche Änderung sicher wäre.
expected_behavior: Uses or proposes callchain evidence only when a method-level caller/callee question becomes material
forbidden_behavior: Runs Joern without a decision-relevant method question
